title: Jurassic Reborn
description: Jurassic Reborn (JR) is a mod based on prehistoric creatures from different games, movies, and fandoms relating to the Jurassic Park / World Universe. JR has added 97 different creatures such as dinosaurs, marine reptiles, prehistoric fish, animals!
body: Jurassic Reborn (JR) is a mod based on prehistoric creatures from different games, movies, and fandoms relating to the Jurassic Park / World Universe. JR has added 108 different creatures such as dinosaurs, marine reptiles, prehistoric fish, animals, and hybrids to Minecraft, all having unique A.I, animations, textures, and models! Each update developed is extensively bug tested in order to ensure that we send out a finished product that is up to the highest quality standards, with as few bugs and inconveniences for users as possible. In the event of a bug, however, new versions of the mod will be promptly released with appropriate bug fixes.  There's much to see here. So, take your time, look around, and learn all there is to know about us. Hope you enjoy our ultimate Jurassic World Minecraft experience!
